10/13/93 9:41AM C/C FOR TRIAL ALL PARTIES EXCEPT DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF WITNESS RICHARD FRANKLIN HALE SWORN & EXAMINED. PLAINTIFF EXHIBIT #1 COPY OF BILL OF SALE FROM DMV FOR ID AN EVIDENCE. PLAINTIFF EXHIBIT #2 COPY OF CLASS FILE FROM DMV FOR ID & EVIDENCE. PLAINTIFF EXHIBIT #3 REPAIR ESTIMATE FOR ID & EVIDENCE. EXHIBITS #4A AND 4B PHOTOS OF AUTO FOR ID AND EVIDENCE. 9:45AM COURT FINDS JUDGMENT FOR PLAINTIFF: $2741.19 PLUS 10% PER CENT INTEREST FROM 12/21/93. COST PER COST BILL. PLAINTIFF TO PREPARE JUDGMENT.
THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT REZAIAN, ZAHRA M & H INVESTMENT $2,741.19 PRINCIPAL, $799.46 INTEREST, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,540.65
